rule with where block.description: Rule with a where-block for locally-scoped sub-rules.

capture.description: Named capture; the bound name can be used later in the same rule as a back-reference.

choice.description: Ordered choice: try the left, fall back to the right.

longest choice.description: Longest-match choice: try all alternatives from the same position and commit to the one that consumes the most input. Ties resolve to the earlier arm.

negative lookahead.description: Negative lookahead: succeeds when pattern fails, consumes nothing.

positive lookahead.description: Positive lookahead: succeeds when pattern succeeds, consumes nothing.

cut label.description: Cut marker with a labelled failure message.

bounded quantifier.description: Bounded repetition: between min and max occurrences.
